{{Quote|I have dispatched Sev'Rance to the Erediss system to investigate further.|[[Count of Serenno/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]]|<ref name="GB:CC" />}}
The '''Erediss system''' was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] located in the [[Tion Hegemony/Legends|Tion Hegemony]].<ref name="Xim Week" /> It contained the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Eredenn Prime]].<ref name="GB:CC" />

{{System-stub}}
